title: 戦術的おすすめレシピ

text_block_list.text:
One day, Hishi Amazon is walking through the
shopping district, when...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Get your cabbages here! They're fresh, crunchy,
and delicious to boot—don't miss out on this
bargain!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Well, this a surprise. What brings you here, Biko?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I'm helping bring in some customers for this shop!
The weather was so good that they harvested way
too many cabbages.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
They're having a hard time selling off all the
remaining stock, so I figured a hero should swoop
in to save the day!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Now that's a good mindset to have! I'll take two
off your hands.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But just two won't make much of a dent. I'll help
bring in some customers myself.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Get your cabbages cheap! Hey there, how about
buying some cabbages today?

text_block_list.name: Female Shopper
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, I'm cooking hamburger steaks tonight. I've
already bought the meat, so...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Hm... Why not have this on the side, then?

text_block_list.name: Female Shopper
text_block_list.text:
Well, my children aren't very fond of vegetables.
Even the sight of greens makes them upset.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Just the sight of them?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
How's this? You could dice up the cabbage and
blend it into the meat for the hamburger steaks.

text_block_list.name: Female Shopper
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I bet even my little picky eaters would be
okay with that. I'll take some!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Hishiama, sounds like this customer is struggling
with an upset stomach.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, pot-au-feu could do 'em some good. It's
warming, and cabbage helps a lot with digestion.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And how about you? You're lookin' for something
cheap and filling? Twice-cooked pork is your best
bet!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
And we're all sold out! That was some amazing
work, Hishiama! You could be Cabbage Ranger,
solving problems one cabbage at a time!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Please don't call me "Cabbage Ranger"... Anyway,
I'm glad I could help.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You know, the way I had to change up my tactics
to match each customer's needs could work just
as well for my racing!

Hishi Amazon broadens her strategic skills
following today's events.
